overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 walking through Night City during golden hour. The player navigates a busy urban intersection with futuristic vehicles, graffiti-covered industrial buildings, elevated highways, and neon-lit storefronts while pedestrians and traffic move through the scene.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered industrial building, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals
massive elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
tall futuristic skyscraper visible in the distance against the sunset
black metal railing separating sidewalk from parked cars

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a heavily graffiti-tagged industrial building during golden hour. The elevated highway structure looms ahead against the hazy sunset sky, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk and enters the multi-lane street to cross the intersection
futuristic purple sedan and other vehicles pass close by while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating between passing vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: purple futuristic sedan driving past the crossing pedestrian

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with bright lime green neon trim and signage
tall palm trees lining the opposite side of the street
wet asphalt street surface with lane markings and cardboard debris

segments.scene_description: Having left the graffiti-lined sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide intersection bathed in golden hour light. A distinctive neon lime-green building becomes visible on the left as palm trees line the far side, while futuristic vehicles pass close by during the crossing.

events.description: turns left while continuing to cross the intersection, heading toward the opposite sidewalk
navigates through multiple lanes of traffic including a black SUV and sedan

agents.ego_description: continuing to cross the intersection while turning left, moving with the flow of other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt and shorts running across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Moving through the center of the wide intersection with a leftward trajectory, the neon lime building recedes into the left distance. Other pedestrians cross alongside as various futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection, with the elevated highway structure now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite sidewalk with neon commercial fronts

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues walking along the new street front
large military armored truck drives slowly past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the passing military vehicle

notable_agents.action: military armored truck with six wheels driving slowly past the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with reflective glass facade and graffiti on lower levels
yellow tactile paving strip along the curb edge for accessibility
scattered newspapers and trash littering the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Now on the opposite sidewalk, the scene features a modern glass building on the right with scattered newspaper debris underfoot. The military truck passes prominently on the street, while the neon lime building remains visible in the left distance and the elevated highway continues to span overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a gritty industrial sidewalk into a wide, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins by moving along a concrete path beside a heavily graffiti-tagged building, with the massive structure of an elevated highway looming ahead against a hazy sunset sky. As the camera leaves the graffiti-lined wall, the scene opens into a broad crossing bathed in golden hour light, where a distinctive neon lime-green building emerges on the left and palm trees line the distance. The movement continues across the center of the intersection, weaving through futuristic vehicles and pedestrians while the neon building recedes into the left distance. Finally, the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, passing a modern glass building and scattered newspaper debris as a military truck rolls by under the spanning highway.
